scripts.clean-install: cp ../PingSampleApp/android/gradlew android/gradlew && cp ../PingSampleApp/android/gradlew.bat android/gradlew.bat && cp ../PingSampleApp/android/gradle/wrapper/gradle-wrapper.jar android/gradle/wrapper/gradle-wrapper.jar && chmod +x android/gradlew && cd android && rm -rf .gradle app/build && cd .. && cd ios && rm -rf Pods build && cd .. && rm -rf build && bundle install --path vendor/bundle && bundle exec pod install --repo-update --project-directory=ios
scripts.test:native:ios: xcodebuild test -workspace ios/PingTestRunner.xcworkspace -scheme RNPingCore-Unit-Tests -destination 'platform=iOS Simulator,name=iPhone 16,OS=18.6' && xcodebuild test -workspace ios/PingTestRunner.xcworkspace -scheme RNPingDeviceId-Unit-Tests -destination 'platform=iOS Simulator,name=iPhone 16,OS=18.6' && xcodebuild test -workspace ios/PingTestRunner.xcworkspace -scheme RNPingJourney-Unit-Tests -destination 'platform=iOS Simulator,name=iPhone 16,OS=18.6' && xcodebuild test -workspace ios/PingTestRunner.xcworkspace -scheme RNPingLogger-Unit-Tests -destination 'platform=iOS Simulator,name=iPhone 16,OS=18.6' && xcodebuild test -workspace ios/PingTestRunner.xcworkspace -scheme RNPingOidc-Unit-Tests -destination 'platform=iOS Simulator,name=iPhone 16,OS=18.6' && xcodebuild test -workspace ios/PingTestRunner.xcworkspace -scheme RNPingStorage-Unit-Tests -destination 'platform=iOS Simulator,name=iPhone 16,OS=18.6'
